name: Phi-4-multimodal (5.6B)
archDisplay: Dense transformer (Phi-4-Mini backbone) + mixture-of-LoRAs vision/speech adapters (5.6B)
note: 5.6B unified text+vision+speech model on frozen Phi-4-Mini weights with LoRA adapters; ranked #1 on the HF OpenASR leaderboard (6.14% WER) at release.
tpsNote: No independently verified RTX 4090 llama.cpp benchmark found; the 5.6B size runs comfortably above real-time on a single 4090.
verificationNotes: Re-fetched HF model card: 5.6B params, MIT license, 128K context, 23 text languages, vision (English-only) + 8-language audio confirmed. MMMU 55.1, MathVista 62.4, DocVQA 93.2 confirmed literally on card; card also literally states '#1 on Huggingface OpenASR leaderboard with word error rate 6.14%' (an alternate 6.02 figure also appears on the page but 6.14 is the explicitly cited leaderboard number, kept as-is). Azure pricing $0.08/$0.32 confirmed exact via independent pricing sources. No changes made.
